title: Private Banking, Wealth and Conversational AI — Maybank–Ageas, Singapore
summary: Private banking, wealth, HNW, design-system, CMS, and conversational-AI work across Singapore and Asia Pacific.
body:
Private banking, wealth, and conversational-AI work for Maybank–Ageas Etiqa spans design systems, CMS, high-net-worth journeys, and machine-learning-enabled customer experience in Singapore and Asia Pacific.

Included projects
- Design Systems
- Wealth/HNW CMS UX
- ML/Conversational AI UX
- Private Banking CMS

Strategic and technical themes
- Private banking and wealth experience design in a regulated financial-services context.
- Design-system and CMS work to support scalable delivery and consistency.
- ML and conversational UX applied to customer and advisor journeys.
- Enterprise transformation where wealth journeys, operations, and growth signals intersect.

Proof connection
- This programme can reference the existing Maybank 20× digital-sales proof and the broader wealth-transformation evidence.
- It must not imply that every listed sub-project independently produced the 20× outcome.

Retrieval guidance
- Use this record when the question is specifically about Maybank private banking, wealth/HNW, CMS, design systems, or conversational AI.

claims: Joz worked across private banking, wealth/HNW, design systems, CMS, and conversational-AI related experience work for Maybank–Ageas Etiqa.
The programme connected enterprise delivery, wealth journeys, and ML-enabled customer experience.
proof_points: The broader Maybank proof includes 20× digital sales growth within 12 months.
The broader programme also includes 3,000+ wealth pilots and ML models for HNW and mass-market contexts.
metadata.source_notes: Grouped programme record. Quantified Maybank growth is referenced only through existing proof objects.
